2603.19223.title: F2LLM-v2: Inclusive, Performant, and Efficient Embeddings for a Multilingual World
2603.19223.paper_summary: We present F2LLM-v2, a new family of general-purpose, multilingual embedding models in 8 distinct sizes ranging from 80M to 14B. Trained on a newly curated composite of 60 million publicly available high-quality data samples, F2LLM-v2 supports more than 200 languages, with a particular emphasis on previously underserved mid- and low-resource languages. By integrating a two-stage LLM-based embedding training pipeline with matryoshka learning, model pruning, and knowledge distillation techniques, we present models that are far more efficient than previous LLM-based embedding models while retaining competitive performances. Extensive evaluations confirm that F2LLM-v2-14B ranks first on 11 MTEB benchmarks, while the smaller models in the family also set a new state of the art for resource-constrained applications. To facilitate open-source embedding model research, we release all models, data, code, and intermediate checkpoints.
2603.19223.paper_summary_zh: 我們推出 F2LLM-v2，一個新的通用多語言嵌入模型系列，具有 8 種不同的大小，範圍從 80M 到 14B。F2LLM-v2 在新整理的 6000 萬個公開可用的高品質數據樣本上進行訓練，支持超過 200 種語言，特別強調之前資源不足的中低資源語言。通過將兩階段的基於 LLM 的嵌入訓練管道與馬特ryoshka 學習、模型修剪和知識蒸餾技術相結合，我們呈現的模型在保持競爭性能的同時，效率遠超以前的基於 LLM 的嵌入模型。廣泛的評估證實，F2LLM-v2-14B 在 11 個 MTEB 基準測試中排名第一，而該系列中較小的模型也為資源受限的應用設立了新的技術標準。為了促進開源嵌入模型研究，我們釋放所有模型、數據、代碼和中間檢查點。
2603.19223.author: Ziyin Zhang et.al.
2603.19223.authors: Ziyin Zhang, Zihan Liao, Hang Yu, Peng Di, Rui Wang
